abbreviations.definition: repeat the sequence of loops in brackets L times

materials: YarnArt JEANS (55% cotton, 45% Polyacrylic) Color No.:29
YarnArt Dolce Baby (100% Micro Polyester) Color No.: 80361

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Begin with a magic ring and work 10 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.summary: Work 10 single crochets around for three rows.
rounds.title: Rows 2-4

rounds.summary: Increase four times and work six single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 5

rounds.summary: Repeat single crochet and increase seven times.
rounds.title: Row 6

rounds.summary: Work 21 single crochets around for five rows.
rounds.title: Rows 7-11

rounds.summary: Decrease twice and work ten single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 12

rounds.summary: Work 12 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.rawInstruction: Stuff (it will only be in my head)
rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head portion.
rounds.title: Stuff (it will only be in my head)

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work ten single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 13

rounds.summary: Work 11 single crochets around for seventy rows.
rounds.title: Rows 14-83

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work nine single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 84

rounds.summary: Work 10 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 85

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work eight single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 86

rounds.summary: Work 9 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 87

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work seven single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 88

rounds.rawInstruction: Next, insert the wire into the body, pre-bend the edges of the wire
rounds.summary: Insert and pre-bend wire into the body.
rounds.title: Insert wire

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work six single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 89

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work five single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 90

rounds.summary: Work 6 single crochets around for two rows.
rounds.title: Rows 91-92

rounds.summary: Fasten off and close the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops.

rounds.rawInstruction: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.
rounds.summary: Attach eyes and embroider eyebrows.
rounds.title: We glue the eyes and embroider the eyebrows.

rounds.rawInstruction: Start 10 sc in a magic ring
rounds.summary: Begin with a magic ring and work 10 single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.summary: Increase six times.
rounds.title: Row 2

rounds.summary: Work 12 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 3

rounds.summary: Repeat five single crochets and increase twice.
rounds.title: Row 4

rounds.summary: Work 14 single crochets around for two rows.
rounds.title: Rows 5-6

rounds.rawInstruction: inc, 5 sc, 3 inc, 3 sc, 2 inc = 20 sc
rounds.summary: Increase, work single crochets, and increase as specified.
rounds.title: Row 7

rounds.summary: Increase and work single crochets as specified.
rounds.title: Row 8

rounds.summary: Work 26 single crochets around for seven rows.
rounds.title: Rows 9-15

rounds.summary: Decrease twice, work ten single crochets, decrease twice, and work eight single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 16

rounds.summary: Add stuffing to the head.
rounds.title: Stuff

rounds.rawInstruction: (4 sc, dec) х 3 times, 4 sc = 19 sc
rounds.summary: Repeat four single crochets and decrease three times, then work four single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 17

rounds.rawInstruction: (2 sc, dec) х 4 times, 3 sc = 15 sc
rounds.summary: Repeat two single crochets and decrease four times, then work three single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 18

rounds.summary: Add more stuffing.
rounds.title: Stuff

rounds.summary: Work 15 single crochets around for 74 rows while gradually stuffing.
rounds.title: Rows 19-92

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work thirteen single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 93

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work twelve single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 94

rounds.summary: Work 13 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 95

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work eleven single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 96

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work ten single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 97

rounds.summary: Work 11 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 98

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work nine single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 99

rounds.summary: Decrease once and work eight single crochets.
rounds.title: Row 100

rounds.summary: Repeat single crochet and decrease three times.
rounds.title: Row 101

rounds.summary: Work 6 single crochets around.
rounds.title: Row 102

rounds.summary: Fasten off and close the remaining six stitches.
rounds.title: Close 6 loops.

rounds.rawInstruction: Gluing the eyes: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops. We embroider eyebrows over the eyes:
rounds.summary: Attach eyes with glue and embroider eyebrows.
rounds.title: Gluing the eyes: I smeared the tips of the eyes with glue and inserted them in 10 rows from the beginning of the head, the distance between the eyes is 10 loops. We embroider eyebrows over the eyes:
